title: Villager Archer Camp
description: Adds a Villager Archer Camp to the plains and forest biome
body:
**This mod adds a Villager Archer Camp to the game, featuring Fletcher villagers inside the new camp.**
![Structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19f58fc9a75f1df1408497a63d1f5ce83e6f977d.jpeg)

- You’ll also find bows, crossbows, and arrows throughout the camp.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fae6a043f59e651fcf2d478e1e204a3601103b0.jpeg)
- The camp includes a shooting range for target practice.

![Shooting  Range](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/819bf994983eaa850e24dcceab43de51c7cb1eff.jpeg)


- The Villager Archer Camp can spawn in Forest, Birch Forest, and Plains biomes.



 

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
